title: Viola (One Piece)
description: Im Rahmen der WT100 The 2nd Global Popularity Poll  für One Piece waren viele Charaktere mein Vorbild für die TDF Platten. Viola war ein Teil davon.
description_en: During the WT100 — the 2nd global popularity poll for One Piece — many characters inspired my TDF boards. Viola was one of them.
